calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-17-2023 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-09-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT's Motion For Terminating Sanctions

No appearance.

DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT's Motion For Terminating Sanctions is transferred to be heard on the court's discovery calendar (room 301) on the same date at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported. (302/RBU)

DEFENDANTS MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND DISMISSAL OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS' MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS AND DISMISSAL OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

No Appearances.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling:

Motion granted. No opposition filed. The Court finds that Plaintiff has disobey previous court orders concerning discovery, engaged in egregious discovery misuses by not responding at all (except the single request for extension of time) for the better part of a year, that less severe sanctions would not produce compliance with the discovery rules, and that the ultimate sanction is now justified. August B. Doppes v. Bentley Motors, Inc., 174 Cal. App. 4th 967, 992 (2009). Therefore, Plaintiff's complaint is dismissed with prejudice in its entirety.

Order is signed after hearing as drafted by counsel.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn; Clerk: R. Sahatjian; Not Reported. =(302/JPT)

Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Jan-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT's Motion To Compel.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The Motion to Have Defendant's Second Set of Requests for Admissions deemed admitted is granted. The matters of which admission was requested in defendant's Second Set of Requests for Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions are denied for lack of notice. Code of Civil Procedure sec. 2033.040.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice And Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Dec-08-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT's Motion To Compel:

MOTION GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. The Court notes that the moving party impermissibly combined various motions with different procedural and substantive requirements.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
